General.Name: Gogox Holdings Limited
General.Description: Gogox Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides logistic and delivery solutions in Mainland China, Hong Kong, Korea, Singapore, and internationally. It operates online intra-city logistics platform under the Kuaigou Dache and GoGoX brand names. The company's platform connects transacting user and logistic and delivery service provider in the Mainland China, Hong Kong, Singapore, Korea, and other Asian countries. It is also involved in the provision of information technology, insurance brokerage and consultancy, technical, cargo compensation facilitation, and development and consultation services; motor vehicle repair and maintenance; fuel card arrangement; computer programming activities; rental; and property holding activities. The company was formerly known as 58 Freight Inc. and changed its name to Gogox Holdings Limited in November 2021. Gogox Holdings Limited was founded in 2013 and is headquartered in Tianjin, the People's Republic of China.
